description: Execute V0.8.5 M4 System-Level Architecture Refactor (OMOC Synergy): Correctly dispatch the 'headless worktree' and 'MCP context spoofing' implementation refactoring to the OpenCode Synergy Environment (OMOC). Rely on OMOC's internal model routing (category: deep) and self-healing verification to produce industrial-grade TypeScript code.
scope: 1. Dispatch the task using 'opencode-bridge run' or 'omoc run' to analyze src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, worktree-manager.ts, and bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js. 2. Instruct OMOC to refactor the code (extract path boundaries, robust types, eliminate spaghetti code). 3. Keep business logic and MCP input schemas 100% identical. 4. Use '--verify="cd src/mcp-server && npx tsc"' so the sub-agent environment auto-fixes its own compilation errors before returning control to Hermes. Note: The tasks/ directory is strictly for execution result artifacts and must not contain implementation code.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO changes to business logic or state machine behavior. NO modifications to workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics outside of this patch. Hermes (L2 Orchestrator) is strictly forbidden from manually injecting OpenAI API keys, hand-writing source code, or bypassing the OMOC Synergy environment. OMOC must be used.
stop_conditions: Hermes attempting to bypass OMOC or hand-write code.
